directions.name: Friendly Ground
directions.description: Spacious, rounded, organic. Terracotta CTAs, sage accents, cream background. Typographic hero with large friendly headline. Pill buttons, soft card corners, SVG curve section breaks. Feels like talking to a smart friend who happens to be good at marketing.
directions.rationale: SMB owners are tired of slick agency sites that feel intimidating. This feels warm and trustworthy without trying too hard.

directions.name: Neon Pulse
directions.description: Dark, bold, tech-forward. Near-black background with electric lime accents. Extreme weight contrast in typography. Sharp edges, angled section dividers, bento grid capabilities section with glowing hover states. Feels like a growth engine.
directions.rationale: Voice AI + ads + outreach is a tech-heavy stack. This positions you as the modern operator bringing firepower to small businesses.

directions.name: Open Book
directions.description: Editorial, storytelling-driven. Split-screen hero with narrative copy. Serif headings for authority, sans body for approachability. Alternating section layouts, warm coral CTAs, soft gold accents. Process reads like a story.
directions.rationale: Selling a complex stack to non-technical SMB owners. The editorial approach lets you explain rather than just list. Serif/sans pairing says knowledgeable but not intimidating.
